reasoning:
The question asks if Praggnanandhaa's Elo rating on Wikipedia will be 1% higher than its value on June 8, 2025 for four dates. As of June 8, 2025, his rating on the Wikipedia FIDE Rankings page (based on the official June 1 FIDE list) is 2767. To be 1% higher, his rating needs to increase by ~27.7 points, requiring a listed rating of at least 2795.   

For 2025-06-15: Official FIDE ratings only update monthly (on the 1st). The rating on the page will definitively remain 2767. Probability is assigned the minimum allowed (0.02).  

For 2025-07-08: This date will reflect the July 1 FIDE list. Following his games in early June (such as the Avagyan Memorial where he scored 5.5/9 against a slightly lower-rated field), his live rating has slightly dropped or stayed level. It is mathematically impossible for him to gain enough points in the little remaining time in June to publish a 2795 rating by July 1. Probability is 0.02.  

For 2025-09-06 (reflecting September 1 list): Gaining nearly 28 points moving from #7 (2767) towards ~#2-3 in the world (2795) in just two months is exceptionally difficult, even for a rapidly improving 19-year-old prodigy. It requires prolonged >2850+ performance strings which is highly unlikely, but slightly more possible than in zero days. Probability: 0.04.  

For 2025-12-05 (reflecting December 1 list): With a 6-month horizon, there's more time to string together multiple strong tournament performances. However, attaining a 2795 Elo is nearly historic for a young player and would mean bypassing many top elites to become a clear #2/#3 in the world. While possible given the trajectory of Indian prodigies, it remains a rare tail event. Probability scales to 0.07.
